prose.title: 88m mos
prose.body: The 88M MOS (Military Occupational Specialty) in the U.S. Army is the Motor Transport Operator. As an 88M, your primary role is to operate and maintain various military vehicles, such as trucks, buses, and cargo vehicles. You will be responsible for transporting personnel, equipment, and supplies both on and off the battlefield. Some of your tasks may include vehicle inspections, cargo and passenger loading/unloading, convoy operations, and basic vehicle maintenance.
